note: Cross-service contract for the drop-sale admission token. The gate service (Go) signs this HMAC-SHA256 JWT; the API (NestJS) verifies it. Both services test against this pinned vector so a change to the byte format on one side fails loudly instead of silently 403-ing the on-sale. Regenerate only by running services/gate signAdmission against the inputs below and updating token to match.
